description:
Role: Backend Developer

We are looking for an experienced Backend Developer to join our team.

Responsibilities:
- Design and build scalable REST APIs using Java and Spring Boot
- Work with MySQL and Redis for data persistence
- Deploy services using Docker and Kubernetes on AWS
- Collaborate with frontend teams using React

Required Skills:
Java, Spring Boot, MySQL, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, REST

Good to Have:
Kafka, Redis, Python

Experience: 4+ years
Salary: 18 LPA

Role: Full Stack Developer

We need a talented Full Stack Developer to build end-to-end web applications.

Required Skills:
React, Node.js, JavaScript, MySQL, Git, REST

Good to Have:
TypeScript, MongoDB, Docker

Experience: 3+ years
Salary: $80,000 - $100,000 per annum

Role: DevOps Engineer

Responsible for managing CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, and container orchestration.

Required Skills:
Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Jenkins, Git, Linux, Bash, CI/CD

Optional:
Terraform, Ansible, Python

Experience: 5+ years
Salary: ₹25,00,000 per annum

Role: Junior Python Developer

Looking for fresh graduates or entry level developers with a passion for Python.

Required Skills:
Python, REST, Git

Preferred:
Flask, Django, MySQL

Experience: Fresher / Entry level
Salary: 6 LPA
